titleStmt.title: SII 8.320: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 320. (A.R. No. 46 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmevivaḷar tiruppoṉmātu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalamperitu ciṟappa vijaiyamāmakaḷ velpuyat tiruppa Icaiyuñ celviyum
Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇilamaṭantaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷartarum maṇimuṭi kavittena Aṇimuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattup palluyiṟ kellām El
lai yiṉiṉpam Iyalviṉi leyta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅko locci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻi naṭappac cempoṉ virasiṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirunta
ruḷiya koIrājakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvatu Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉai
ppāṭik kiḻānmurnāṭṭu Ātirājamaṅkalliyapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyāṟkup pūcaikkun tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum tiru
muṉaippāṭip peṟukaṉūrnāṭṭuk kūṭalūr paññākamuttaraiyan Āḷappiṟantān Eḻicaimokanāṉa kulottuṅka
kacoḻak kāṭavarāyaṉen Inṉāṭṭil Eṉ kāvalāna Ittevar tevatānamāna Ūrkaḷil ciṟuvarakūrum tevaṉūruṅ kīḻkkumāramaṅkalamu
maṅkalamum Āna Ivvūr munṟinālum naṉcaiyun puṉcaiyun taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭaṅkaḷuñ cekkukkaḷum tirunan=tavaṉaṅkaḷālum nān
koḷḷum perumpāṭikāval ciṟupāṭikāva
Digital edition of SII 8.320 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
